org.apache.paimon.flink.source.align

Class PlaceholderSplit

  • java.lang.Object
    • org.apache.paimon.table.source.DataSplit
      • org.apache.paimon.flink.source.align.PlaceholderSplit
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    Serializable, Split

    public class PlaceholderSplit
extends DataSplit
    Used as a placeholder for an empty snapshot, indicating that the current snapshot does not contain any Split.
    See Also:
    Serialized Form
